title: Domain Shift, Adapted
tagline: When the training distribution and the deployment distribution disagree — and what to do about it
summary: Source and target domains drift apart on a 2-D classification toy. Watch a vanilla classifier collapse on the target, then add a CORAL feature-alignment step (hand-coded covariance matching) and an OOD energy score. Live source/target accuracy + OOD detection ROC. Direct fit for cross-city sensor calibration.
highlights: Source / target distribution drift slider; watch the vanilla classifier collapse on target.
CORAL covariance alignment computed live — recovers most of the lost accuracy with no target labels.
Energy-score OOD detector with a ROC curve over a held-out OOD set.
Lab-aligned: cross-city sensor calibration, season-shifted air-quality models, satellite domain transfer.
